title: DEV-SLICE-004 workspace permission and settings projection implementation report

defects_reproduced.before: A loaded read-only snapshot had no explicit, independently owned editable-local-copy identity or action.
defects_reproduced.after: An authorized completed replay/commentary snapshot exposes a clearly named local-copy action that creates a distinct memory-owned local source.

defects_reproduced.before: Completed commentary had no contract-independent local-copy shell.
defects_reproduced.after: The generic completed-commentary snapshot identity and copy shell work only for real already-loaded PGN data; protected loading remains contract-blocked.

defects_reproduced.before: Settings received no typed page/mode/source capability projection.
defects_reproduced.after: SettingsSurface requires a deterministic SettingsCapabilityContext and renders only applicable controls.

defects_reproduced.before: One broad local-PGN permission authorized both open and insert.
defects_reproduced.after: Open-as-new, insert-current, mutate-current, and create-local-copy are separate named capabilities.

defects_reproduced.before: Open and insert converged on ambiguous handlers without an explicit source-ownership boundary.
defects_reproduced.after: Open always creates a new local identity; insert is guarded by current local editability and the exact expected source identity.

defects_reproduced.before: Competition routes displayed workspace-only settings as if globally applicable.
defects_reproduced.after: Competition list/detail receive theme-only route contexts; non-settings surfaces remain without SettingsSurface.

defects_reproduced.before: Settings initialized analysis permission as a fixed true value.
defects_reproduced.after: No AI enablement/default preference is projected or persisted; the local-only note states that analysis requires an explicit action.

implementation_decisions: DataSource is a discriminated ownership union for empty, local-editable, and completed-read-only sources.
Local and read-only identities are generated in memory and are never persisted by this slice.
The PGN Store is the final guard for insertion, move/variation mutation, annotation mutation, and analysis writes.
The file runtime captures the insertion target identity before opening the chooser and checks it before and after asynchronous file reading.
A local copy deep-clones approved PGN items, move trees, parent links, annotations, comments, NAGs, and approved local teaching fields while replacing source ownership.
Settings projection derives from the existing route context, workspace mode, active DataSource, and permission adapter without adding a Store or persistence owner.

before.canImportLocalPgn: One ambiguous boolean controlled open and insert.
before.mutation: UI context readonly was not a complete Store-side source ownership guard.

after.canOpenLocalPgnAsNewSource: Allows an independent local source replacement; never inserts into the active source.
after.canInsertLocalPgnIntoCurrentSource: True only for a loaded explicitly local editable DataSource.
after.canMutateCurrentSource: True only for a loaded explicitly local editable DataSource.
after.canCreateEditableLocalCopy: True only for a real loaded completed read-only snapshot in replay or completed-commentary mode; false for live.
after.canRunAnalysis: True only when current-source mutation is authorized.

runtime: handlePgnAction checks the exact open or insert capability before opening the chooser.
Insert captures pgn.source.id and rejects a changed target both before and after File.text().
pgn_store: insertText rejects every non-local or non-editable active source.
insertPgnFromFen rejects a loaded read-only source.
tryMove, promotion resolution, branch resolution, drawing mutation, clear, undo, and redo re-check canMutateCurrentSource.
createEditableLocalCopy re-checks real snapshot, copy policy, and replay/commentary mode.
analysis_store: Analysis context creation requires a local mutable source and records sourceId.
Async result acceptance requires the same mutable sourceId, node, and position.
Annotation assessment writes re-check mutable source ownership and sourceId.

source_identity_rules.empty: type=null, empty id, ownership=none, editable=false, copy forbidden.
source_identity_rules.open_local: Creates a new local:<memory-id>, origin=local-file, editable=true source each time.
source_identity_rules.manual_position: Creates a new local:<memory-id>, origin=manual-position source only when no loaded source exists.
source_identity_rules.completed_readonly: Creates a readonly:<memory-id> remote source with completed-snapshot copy policy only after real PGN data is available.
source_identity_rules.editable_copy: Creates a new local:<memory-id>, origin=readonly-copy, strips filename/remote ownership/handoff/transport identity, and is visibly labeled 本地可编辑副本 plus a shortened local identity.
source_identity_rules.persistence: All new source identities and copied PGN state remain memory-owned.

preserved: move tree structure and selection identifiers
annotations, comments, analysis annotation values, and NAGs
deep_clone: parent links rebound to cloned parents
local_copy_semantics.original_immutability: Browser evidence confirmed distinct item/tree/root/child/annotation references; local annotation mutation changed only the copy.

completed_commentary_boundary.implemented: A completed-commentary readonly DataSource projection and local-copy shell operate on real already-loaded canonical PGN snapshots.
completed_commentary_boundary.not_implemented: No protected commentary/replay request, fake success, synthetic game, new contract, clock, credential, or persistence owner.
completed_commentary_boundary.status: MISSING-UI-014 remains partially contract-blocked and is not claimed closed.

settings_applicability_matrix.surface: compatibility, NotFound, login, venue display, live unavailable
settings_applicability_matrix.reason: No authority declares workspace settings applicable on these surfaces.

provisional_ai_setting_behavior.local_context_copy: AI 分析仅在允许的本地来源中由用户显式启动；这里不保存 AI 启用状态或默认分析范围。

contract_blocked_remainder: /match/:key remains unavailable and issues no request before a confirmed contract.
/share/:uuid remains unavailable and gains no fake PGN or copy success.
/cloud/:fileid remains unavailable and gains no fake PGN or copy success.
Protected replay/commentary success remains unavailable when the capability contract is absent.
No login demand is introduced ahead of contract availability.

tools: temporary in-browser Pinia/handoff projection for unavailable read-only contracts

no_source.settings: theme, source navigation layout, and toolbar collapse only

local_source.temporary_pgn: Loaded through a native file chooser; temporary PGN and browser artifacts were removed and none are retained in the repository.
local_source.insert_result: Game count changed from 1 to 2 while the local identity prefix remained 0f4cc418.
local_source.copy_action: absent because the source was already local editable.
local_source.settings: local board/right-panel/analysis controls present; AI note makes explicit-action and no-persistence behavior clear.

readonly_projection.limitation: No currently approved protected replay/commentary contract was reachable, so page-only state projection was used without repository source changes.
readonly_projection.insert: disabled in UI and rejected by Store
readonly_projection.move_annotation_analysis: Store attempts returned no canonical graph, FEN, item, tree, or annotation changes; analysis did not start.
readonly_projection.copy_integrity: Distinct item/tree/root/child/annotation references and rebound parent links; mutation of the local copy left the original unchanged.
readonly_projection.copy_status_projection: After the source became local, the stale remote-unavailable banner cleared, the local-copy label appeared, and insertion became enabled.
readonly_projection.open_as_new_integrity: The new local PGN replaced the active source without mutating the saved readonly item or identity.
readonly_projection.live_exclusion: A live-spectator projection exposed no copy action, insertion, analysis tab, or mutation capability.
readonly_projection.commentary_shell: A completed-commentary projection showed 赛事讲解, 完成赛事讲解只读快照, disabled insertion, and the authorized copy action.

stale_callback.projection: File.text() replaced the local source before resolving.
stale_callback.result: The stale PGN was not inserted; the replacement source remained one game and the runtime reported 插入目标已变化，请重新选择当前本地来源。

route_settings.competition_list: theme only; workspace and AI controls absent
route_settings.competition_detail: theme only; workspace and AI controls absent
route_settings.back_forward_refresh: detail/list identity and theme-only settings remained deterministic after back, forward, and reload
route_settings.mode_source_changes: no-source, local, replay readonly, live readonly, and completed-commentary projections updated controls deterministically

contract_blocked_route.visible_truth: 这项能力尚未具备已确认的读取合同，当前不会发起请求。

overlay_and_accessibility.desktop: right-placement Drawer; initial focus on 关闭设置
overlay_and_accessibility.narrow_520x800: bottom-placement Sheet; initial focus on 关闭设置
overlay_and_accessibility.escape: closed both forms and returned focus to 设置
overlay_and_accessibility.themes: light produced color-scheme light and dark produced color-scheme dark
overlay_and_accessibility.console: no breaking application errors; one non-breaking favicon.ico 404 was observed in one browser session

cor_impact.COR-003: DEV-SLICE-004 permission/source-ownership portion implemented; no unrelated dirty-state or editor work claimed.
cor_impact.COR-026: DEV-SLICE-004 typed route/mode/source settings projection implemented; no authority-wide backlog closure claimed.

od_boundaries.OD-01: No teaching collection/session entity or persistence owner added.
od_boundaries.OD-02: No recovery duration, autosave contract, or Dexie table added.
od_boundaries.OD-03: No AI-enabled default is asserted or persisted.
od_boundaries.OD-04: No full-game/default analysis scope is asserted or persisted.
od_boundaries.OD-05_to_OD-11: Remain open and unchanged; no provisional value is converted into authority.

limitations: The protected replay/commentary PGN contract is unavailable, so the read-only completed-source validation used an explicitly documented temporary browser projection.
MISSING-UI-014 is not fully closed because contract-dependent completed-event data loading remains blocked.
Source identities are intentionally memory-only and change on every independent open or copy.
The observed favicon.ico 404 is pre-existing/non-breaking and outside this slice.
